prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第144名持续上升至2026年第87名，近年排名显著提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2023年曾 因教师核酸检测事件出现偏负面舆情，2024年因校区争议评价中性/混合；抖音热度排名第32（较热），短视频曝光度较高，反映报考关注度升温；第五轮学科 评估中海南大学暂无A-及以上学科，整体学科实力处于上升期但尚未形成明显优势学科吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高 热推荐，与海南大学物理类招生专业（计算机、软件、人工智能、自动化等）高度契合，相关专业热度对报考有正向拉动；本省2026年物理类考生456000人，较2025年440208人增 加约3.6%，竞争加剧；海南大学位于海南省，对广东考生而言属于跨省报考，广东考生规模大但海南大学在广东招生计划占比较 高（2025年物理类149人），跨省地域偏好无明显偏向。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类考生增加约3.6%带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升（9 3→87）提升吸引力、以及抖音热度较热反映报考关注升温，在2025年基准54542名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约54622名，区间54122–55122名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 32656 → 37386 → 40023 → 50829 → 54542, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 21886 places in the past 4 years, averaging about 5472 places per year; the 2025 baseline is about 54542.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category plan was 65 in 2021 → 49 in 2022 → 54 in 2023 → 104 in 2024 → 149 in 2025 → 148 in 2026, with a significant expansion in 2025 followed by a slight decrease of 1 in 2026, essentially flat, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with a significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2023, there was a somewhat negative public opinion due to a teacher nucleic acid testing incident, and in 2024, the evaluation was neutral/mixed due to campus disputes; Douyin popularity ranking is 32nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention in applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University has no A- or above disciplines, with overall disciplinary strength on the rise but not yet forming a clear advantage in attracting disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Hainan University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Software, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, etc.), with related major popularity positively driving applications; in 2026, the province has 456,000 Physics Category examinees, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, which is a cross-provincial application for Guangdong examinees, with a large number of Guangdong examinees but a relatively high proportion of enrollment plans for Hainan University in Guangdong (149 in Physics Category in 2025), with no obvious bias in cross-provincial regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the intensification of competition due to a 3.6% increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026, the rising Soft Science ranking (93→87) enhancing attractiveness, and the hot Douyin popularity reflecting increased application attention, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 54542; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 54622, with a range of 54122–55122.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated: approximately 7149 → 7447 → 8218 → 9245 → 8167, showing an overall trend of moving backward with fluctuations, peaking at 9245 in 2024 before rebounding to 8167 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 8167th place; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 23 in 2021 → 26 in 2022 → 24 in 2023 → 24 in 2024 → 22 in 2025 → 21 in 2026, with a decrease of 1 person from 2025 to 2026, a slight reduction of about 4.5%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2023, there was somewhat negative public opinion due to a teacher nucleic acid testing incident; in 2024, evaluations were neutral/mixed due to campus disputes; Douyin popularity ranking 32nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University has no A- or above disciplines, with overall discipline strength in a rising phase but not yet forming obvious advantageous discipline appeal; 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking rose from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature are relatively hot, aligning to some extent with Hainan University's History Category enrollment majors (Law, Finance, Accounting, Communication, etc.); the provincial number of History Category examinees in 2026 is 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, which is a cross-provincial application for Guangdong examinees; Guangdong has a large number of examinees, but Hainan University's History Category enrollment plan in Guangdong is small (22 in 2025), with no obvious regional preference for cross-provincial applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of the 2025 ranking significantly rising from 2024 (9245 → 8167), the intensified competition due to an approximately 11.6% increase in History Category examinees in 2026, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's appeal, and the slight reduction in enrollment plan by about 4.5%, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 8167th place; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8094th, with a range of 7594–8594.
